item.description: NBC News’ Julia Ainsley reports from outside the Supreme Court where crowds cheered and celebrated after the court rejected President Donald Trump’s attempt to limit birthright citizenship.

media:content.media:title: Crowds outside Supreme Court cheer at birthright citizenship decision
media:content.media:description: NBC News’ Julia Ainsley reports from outside the Supreme Court where crowds cheered and celebrated after the court rejected President Donald Trump’s attempt to limit birthright citizenship.

item.title: Crowds outside Supreme Court cheer at birthright citizenship decision

item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley
item.description: Delivering another major blow to LGBTQ rights, the Supreme Court on Tuesday upheld state laws that ban transgender athletes from participating in girls' and women's sports.

media:content.media:text: Becky Pepper-Jackson outside the Supreme Court
media:content.media:description: Becky Pepper-Jackson outside the Supreme Court on Jan. 11, 2026.

item.title: Supreme Court upholds transgender bans in girls’ and women’s sports

item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley
item.description: The Supreme Court struck down longtime campaign finance rules challenged by Vice President JD Vance that place limits on how much a national political party committee can spend in coordination with individual candidates.

media:content.media:text: JD Vance
media:content.media:description: US Vice President JD Vance delivers remarks on the economy at Uline in Alburtis, near Allentown, Pennsylvania, on December 16, 2025.

item.title: Supreme Court strikes down long-standing campaign finance restrictions

item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley
item.description: The Supreme Court on Tuesday agreed to decide whether states and local governments can ban semiautomatic rifles like the AR-15, which are popular among gun enthusiasts but have also been used in high-profile mass shootings.

media:content.media:text: In this photo illustration, a semi-automatic AR-15 is displayed on a countertop at the McBride Guns Inc. store on August 25, 2023 in Austin, Texas.
media:content.media:description: An AR-15 is displayed on a countertop at a gun store in Austin, Texas.

item.title: Supreme Court agrees to hear challenge to assault weapon bans

item.description: Brazil beat Japan 2-1 in extra time to secure a spot in the World Cup's Round of 16. NBC News' Jesse Kirsch explains the knockout round and what's ahead for Team USA.

media:content.media:title: World Cup: Brazil ousts Japan, U.S. prepares for Bosnia match
media:content.media:description: Brazil beat Japan 2-1 in extra time to secure a spot in the World Cup's Round of 16. NBC News' Jesse Kirsch explains the knockout round and what's ahead for Team USA.

item.title: World Cup: Brazil ousts Japan, U.S. prepares for Bosnia match

item.description: Antonio Nusa pone a gritar a todo el público noruego al poner el primer tanto ante Costa de Marfil. El sueño de los octavos de final se acercan y sueñan con un Mundial histórico.

media:content.media:title: Los vikingos pegan primero y ponen a vibrar todo Dallas
media:content.media:description: Antonio Nusa pone a gritar a todo el público noruego al poner el primer tanto ante Costa de Marfil. El sueño de los octavos de final se acercan y sueñan con un Mundial histórico.

item.title: Los vikingos pegan primero y ponen a vibrar todo Dallas

item.description: El futbolista tomó el esférico, recortó hacia el centro en el área grande y venció al arquero con un potente disparo... Una verdadera obra de arte.

media:content.media:title: Tremendo golazo de Antonio Nusa para el 0-1 de Noruega ante Costa de Marfil
media:content.media:description: El futbolista tomó el esférico, recortó hacia el centro en el área grande y venció al arquero con un potente disparo... Una verdadera obra de arte.

item.title: Tremendo golazo de Antonio Nusa para el 0-1 de Noruega ante Costa de Marfil

item.description: El delantero mexicano habló sobre su experiencia desde su llegada al país, los sacrificios que tuvo que hacer y el camino que lo llevó a representar a la nación en una Copa del Mundo.

media:content.media:title: Julián Quiñones habla con el corazón sobre el orgullo de jugar para México
media:content.media:description: El delantero mexicano habló sobre su experiencia desde su llegada al país, los sacrificios que tuvo que hacer y el camino que lo llevó a representar a la nación en una Copa del Mundo.

item.title: Julián Quiñones habla con el corazón sobre el orgullo de jugar para México

item.description: Diomande y compañía quieren darle un susto a los nórdicos que han demostrado tener una temible ofensiva. Preparan los últimos detalles en un duelo que promete ser espectacular.

media:content.media:title: ¡No te lo pierdas! Costa de Marfil se prepara para hacer historia y clasificar a 8vos de final
media:content.media:description: Diomande y compañía quieren darle un susto a los nórdicos que han demostrado tener una temible ofensiva. Preparan los últimos detalles en un duelo que promete ser espectacular.

item.title: ¡No te lo pierdas! Costa de Marfil se prepara para hacer historia y clasificar a 8vos de final

item.description: Nuestro experto se sorprende por la adaptación de Julián Quiñones al sistema de la Selección de México, sin embargo, asegura que de centro de delantero sería más eficiente.

media:content.media:title: Pékerman: “Quiñones le da el gol a México” | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Nuestro experto se sorprende por la adaptación de Julián Quiñones al sistema de la Selección de México, sin embargo, asegura que de centro de delantero sería más eficiente.

item.title: Pékerman: “Quiñones le da el gol a México” | Vive el Mundial

item.description: Erling Haaland y la Selección Noruega ya están en el estadio para enfrentar a Costa de Marfil en los dieciseisavos de final de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026™. Los nórdicos buscarán imponer su fuerza ante los Elefantes y avanzar a octavos.

media:content.media:title: Noruega llega con alma vikinga para retar a Costa de Marfil
media:content.media:description: Erling Haaland y la Selección Noruega ya están en el estadio para enfrentar a Costa de Marfil en los dieciseisavos de final de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026™. Los nórdicos buscarán imponer su fuerza ante los Elefantes y avanzar a octavos.

item.title: Noruega llega con alma vikinga para retar a Costa de Marfil

item.description: Paul Fawkes, de Twin Stone Hats, habla sobre una de las tradiciones más icónicas de la región, que se ha convertido en una extraordinaria sede del Mundial.

media:content.media:title: Los sombreros vaqueros que unen al mundo del fútbol en Texas
media:content.media:description: Paul Fawkes, de Twin Stone Hats, habla sobre una de las tradiciones más icónicas de la región, que se ha convertido en una extraordinaria sede del Mundial.

item.title: Los sombreros vaqueros que unen al mundo del fútbol en Texas

item.description: La Selección de Costa de Marfil hizo una gran fase de grupos, pero el reto se volvió mayor al toparse a la poderosa Noruega, comandada por Erling Haaland.

media:content.media:title: Los elefantes marfileños llegan a Dallas y quieren eliminar a los vikingos noruegos
media:content.media:description: La Selección de Costa de Marfil hizo una gran fase de grupos, pero el reto se volvió mayor al toparse a la poderosa Noruega, comandada por Erling Haaland.

item.title: Los elefantes marfileños llegan a Dallas y quieren eliminar a los vikingos noruegos

item.description: En una intensa definición por penales, los "Leones del Atlas" se impusieron 3-2; luego de los cobros fallados por Kluivert, Timber y Summerville de los Países Bajos, Ismael Saibari firmó el cobro decisivo que selló el pase a 8vos en Monterrey.

media:content.media:title: ¡Tensión pura! Revive la tanda de penales con la que Marruecos eliminó a Países Bajos en el Mundial
media:content.media:description: En una intensa definición por penales, los "Leones del Atlas" se impusieron 3-2; luego de los cobros fallados por Kluivert, Timber y Summerville de los Países Bajos, Ismael Saibari firmó el cobro decisivo que selló el pase a 8vos en Monterrey.

item.title: ¡Tensión pura! Revive la tanda de penales con la que Marruecos eliminó a Países Bajos en el Mundial

item.description: Brasil remontó para eliminar a Japón, Paraguay dio el gran golpe al dejar fuera a Alemania en los penales y Marruecos eliminó a Países Bajos desde los once pasos en otra jornada vibrante de los dieciseisavos de final.

media:content.media:title: Paraguay y Marruecos sorprenden, Brasil responde y el Mundial pierde a dos gigantes
media:content.media:description: Brasil remontó para eliminar a Japón, Paraguay dio el gran golpe al dejar fuera a Alemania en los penales y Marruecos eliminó a Países Bajos desde los once pasos en otra jornada vibrante de los dieciseisavos de final.

item.title: Paraguay y Marruecos sorprenden, Brasil responde y el Mundial pierde a dos gigantes

item.description: President Donald Trump is sending a high-level team to the Middle East to resume peace negotiations with Iran after days of attacks but both sides appear far from any formal agreement. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: US Seeks Peace Talks, but Iran Says a Deal Is Far Off
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is sending a high-level team to the Middle East to resume peace negotiations with Iran after days of attacks but both sides appear far from any formal agreement. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

item.title: US Seeks Peace Talks, but Iran Says a Deal Is Far Off

item.dc:creator: Freddie Clayton
Chantal Da Silva
item.description: The U.N. report alleged Israel has a “deliberate strategy” of targeting children in the occupied West Bank and Gaza Strip, which Israel rejects.

media:content.media:text: Three year old Rayan Abu al-Ajeen killed by Israeli forces.
media:content.media:description: 3-year-old Rayan Abu al-Ajeen.

media:content.media:text: Palestinians protest confiscation of land in occupied West Bank
media:content.media:description: 3-year-old Rayan Abu al-Ajeen.

media:content.media:text: Palestinian children in the West Bank
media:content.media:description: 3-year-old Rayan Abu al-Ajeen.

media:content.media:text: Residents continued to live in the area near the Israeli military's "yellow line" amid ongoing operations and widespread damage.
media:content.media:description: 3-year-old Rayan Abu al-Ajeen.

item.title: 3-year-old shot dead in Gaza as U.N. report accuses Israel of targeting children

item.dc:creator: Mike Hixenbaugh
item.description: For a half-century, U.S. policy has pushed to keep disabled Americans out of institutions. Now Rebecca Anger and others fear that era could end.

media:content.media:text: A split composite image of Rebecca Anger having her legs and feet fastened into a wheelchair, and a plant by a windowsill
media:content.media:description: Rebecca Anger, a 41-year-old lawyer in Chicago, relies on caregivers to get through each workday.

media:content.media:text: Christine O'Conner helps fasten Rebecca Anger's feet into her wheelchair as she's seated
media:content.media:description: Rebecca Anger, a 41-year-old lawyer in Chicago, relies on caregivers to get through each workday.

media:content.media:text: Christine O'Connor, a preschool teacher, cares for Rebecca about six hours each week under a Medicaid program that pays $19.50 an hour.
media:content.media:description: Rebecca Anger, a 41-year-old lawyer in Chicago, relies on caregivers to get through each workday.

media:content.media:text: Greg Anger, left, and Rebecca Anger sit outside in their wheelchairs
media:content.media:description: Rebecca Anger, a 41-year-old lawyer in Chicago, relies on caregivers to get through each workday.

media:content.media:text: As seen through a doorway, a woman assists Rebecca Anger who is seated in a wheelchair, as Greg Anger watches, also seated in a wheelchair
media:content.media:description: Rebecca Anger, a 41-year-old lawyer in Chicago, relies on caregivers to get through each workday.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy Cindy Stevens; Courtesy LaTisha Brown
media:content.media:text:
A split composite image, on left: A portrait of Evan Stevens smiling against a blue backdrop
On right: LaTisha Brown smiles while wearing a white dress and holding a bouquet of flowers, she is seated on a wheelchair out of frame
media:content.media:description: Rebecca Anger, a 41-year-old lawyer in Chicago, relies on caregivers to get through each workday.

media:content.media:text: Two photos of Rebecca Anger's childhood are slightly overlaid atop on another on a white background
media:content.media:description: Rebecca Anger, a 41-year-old lawyer in Chicago, relies on caregivers to get through each workday.

media:content.media:text: Rebecca Anger as a child, smiling, seated on a wheelchair with a floral design backpack on her lap
media:content.media:description: Rebecca Anger, a 41-year-old lawyer in Chicago, relies on caregivers to get through each workday.

media:content.media:text: A split composite image, on the left, Rebecca's hand is on a wheelchair controller, on the right, Rebecca is seen on a street mirror in her wheelchair traveling on the sidewalk
media:content.media:description: Rebecca Anger, a 41-year-old lawyer in Chicago, relies on caregivers to get through each workday.

media:content.media:text: Rebecca Anger, center, is seated in a wheelchair while surrounded by three of her siblings, posing for a portrait outside
media:content.media:description: Rebecca Anger, a 41-year-old lawyer in Chicago, relies on caregivers to get through each workday.

media:content.media:text: Greg, left, and Rebecca Anger are seated in wheelchairs while Greg is in a gray wedding tuxedo and Rebecca wears a white wedding dress and holds a bouquet of flowers
media:content.media:description: Rebecca Anger, a 41-year-old lawyer in Chicago, relies on caregivers to get through each workday.

media:content.media:text: A split composite image: photo on the left shows a framed picture of Ruth Bader Ginsburg wearing a baseball cap next to a label that reads "Rebecca Anger, Staff Attorney", in the middle photo - assistive devices, two prongs attached to long handles gathered together, and photo on the right shows Rebecca using the devices, controlled by her mouth, to do work on her laptop
media:content.media:description: Rebecca Anger, a 41-year-old lawyer in Chicago, relies on caregivers to get through each workday.

media:content.media:text: Rebecca Anger is seen riding the bus in the priority section while seated in a wheelchair
media:content.media:description: Rebecca Anger, a 41-year-old lawyer in Chicago, relies on caregivers to get through each workday.

media:content.media:text: A split composite image of a small leafy plant on a window sill, left, and Rebecca Anger close up profile portrait
media:content.media:description: Rebecca Anger, a 41-year-old lawyer in Chicago, relies on caregivers to get through each workday.

item.title: Paralyzed at 7, she fought for the life she wanted. Medicaid cuts threaten to take it away.

item.description: Officials in Venezuela say the death toll from the back-to-back earthquakes last week has risen to more than 1,700 people. It comes as rescue teams from around the world continue to comb through the rubble of toppled building for survivors. The United Nations estimates the death toll could climb as high as 10,000 people.

media:content.media:title: Venezuelan Earthquakes: Window for Finding Survivors Shrinks
media:content.media:description: Officials in Venezuela say the death toll from the back-to-back earthquakes last week has risen to more than 1,700 people. It comes as rescue teams from around the world continue to comb through the rubble of toppled building for survivors. The United Nations estimates the death toll could climb as high as 10,000 people.

item.title: Venezuelan Earthquakes: Window for Finding Survivors Shrinks

item.dc:creator: Ben Kamisar
Annelise Hanson
Adam Edelman
Bridget Bowman
item.description: Veteran Colorado Democrats running for Senate, governor and House are facing another round of insurgent challengers Tuesday.

media:content.media:text: Democratic House Reps. Rep. Diana DeGette, D-CO.
media:content.media:description: Rep. Diana DeGette, D-Colo., faces a primary challenge from the left Tuesday.

media:content.media:text: Melat Kiros
media:content.media:description: Rep. Diana DeGette, D-Colo., faces a primary challenge from the left Tuesday.

item.title: Colorado’s primaries present the next test for the Democratic establishment

item.dc:creator: Daniel Arkin
Steve Kopack
item.description: The British government suggested Tuesday it may challenge Paramount Skydance’s blockbuster $110 billion takeover of Warner Bros.

media:content.media:text: The Paramount office building in Los Angeles.
media:content.media:description: The Paramount office building in Los Angeles.

item.title: British government may ‘intervene’ in Paramount’s takeover of Warner Bros.

item.description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

media:content.media:title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft
media:content.media:description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

item.title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft

item.dc:creator: Adam Reiss
item.description: Blake Lively is seeking more than $8 million in attorneys’ fees and litigation costs from Justin Baldoni, his production company Wayfarer Studios, and the other parties she defeated in their now-dismissed $400 million defamation lawsuit.

media:content.media:text: A split composite image of Blake Lively, left, and Justin Baldoni
media:content.media:description: Blake Lively; Justin Baldoni.

item.title: Blake Lively seeks $8 million in legal fees in Justin Baldoni dispute

item.dc:creator: David K. Li
Madonna Deverson
item.description: A 6-year-old girl is recovering after being bitten by a rabid bat outside her Wisconsin home — before her brother killed the animal with a homemade “Braveheart”-inspired sword, her family and health officials said Tuesday.

media:content.media:text: Image: Silver-haired Bat on tree at night
Cece Kale, a young girl, stands next to a tree while smiling to pose for a portrait, she is barefoot in the grass and wearing a pink dress with white polka dots

item.title: 6-year-old girl bitten by rabid bat while playing outside her Wisconsin home, family says

item.dc:creator: Erika Edwards
item.description: The maker of ZYN nicotine pouches can tell consumers its products are safer to use than cigarettes, the Food and Drug Administration announced Tuesday.

media:content.media:text: Zyn and nicotine mouth pouch products
media:content.media:description: A recent FDA survey showed that among middle and high school students who used nicotine pouches, ZYN was the most popular.

item.title: Are ZYN nicotine pouches safer than smoking? FDA weighs in
